title: Junior Frontend Developer at Zomato Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Zomato Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Zomato Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zomato Holdings Services:
Zomato Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Holdings Services!
